summary: Created comprehensive template schema specification at Skills/frontend/templates/_TEMPLATE.yaml with full documentation and validation guidelines
learnings: Schema balances structure with flexibility through style_notes and custom fields
7-color palette provides comprehensive coverage for all UI elements
Section-based architecture allows for flexible page composition
Extensive documentation and comments make schema self-documenting
notes: Key design decisions: (1) 7-color palette covers all common UI needs (primary, secondary, accent, background, surface, text, text_muted), (2) Enum-based layout options provide good defaults while remaining flexible, (3) style_notes field captures aesthetic nuances that structured fields cannot express, (4) Custom field allows template-specific extensions without breaking schema, (5) Comprehensive documentation within YAML makes it self-documenting and reduces external dependency
